name: Monica Quindley
role: Wedding (daughter Julia) · June 12, 2027 · 150 guests · Private waterside property

handling.tone: Mom-of-the-bride at a premium zip code. Treat as gatekeeper-protector for daughter Julia's first big-spend-on-her-behalf. Trust-building register, not sales.
handling.voice_adjustments: Andre voice: composed, lowercase, references the wedding expo origin and Julia's specific vision. Don't pitch on price; pitch on 'we'll make this property look like a wedding venue.'
handling.context: 14-month patience deal. Discovery call Apr 19 — 14 min, very productive. Monica found us at Kingston Wedding Expo Apr 15. Tasting invited (May 3 missed timing; May 17 or May 31 in play). Open task: 'Get the answer for the tasting' due 04/27.

context_anchors: Daughter Julia's wedding — Julia is first-time-with-pro-caterer
Private waterside property (donation-only) — main house + carriage house + tent in field
Discovered via Kingston Wedding Expo Apr 15
The Pinehills MA / 02360 — gated golf community, retired-affluent demo
Monica is gatekeeper; Julia drives vision (free-flowing, not plated)

lead.source: FB Lead Form — CBO COMEKETO CROWN+ (Kingston Wedding Expo)
lead.next_move: Lock May 17 or May 31 tasting — both Monica and Julia ideally

enrichment.identity_notes: The Pinehills is upscale planned-community in Plymouth, MA — gated golf course, retired-affluent and 50-70s professionals. Classic mom-of-the-bride at premium zip code.
win_angles: Daughter's first wedding catering — Julia leans on Mom's judgment
Premium property = premium expectations, don't pitch price
Wedding Expo origin — reference 'Julia caught your attention at Kingston'
Multi-zone setup as a feature: tent + house + waterside Insta-grade visuals
14-month runway = relationship play, not contract play
nepq_openers: Continuation: 'Hi Monica — circling back on tasting. May 17 at 2 PM or May 31 at 2 PM in Fitchburg. Which works better for you and Julia?'
Identity frame: 'Julia's first time planning with a caterer — what would help her feel like she's in good hands?'
Anchor: 'For 150 at private property — tent + multi-zone + real food + bar — realistically $X-Y. Rather not lock that until we've seen the property.'
open_gaps: Property logistics (kitchen access, power, water, parking)
Whether they're talking to other caterers
Actual property location — for site visit feasibility
enrichment.strategic_note: Long-game flagship lead. Premium property + 150 guests + Julia's first big spend + Monica as gatekeeper. Lock tasting (May 17 or May 31), make tasting day extraordinary, then patient quarterly check-ins through fall 2026 with site visit summer 2026. Generates Pinehills referrals for years if closed.

comms.summary: Met at Kingston Wedding Expo — initial interest
14-min discovery call — full event vision, venue, tasting invited

notes: Patience deal — quarterly cadence through fall 2026
Treat Monica like long-term client, not quarterly target
